title: Document Annotation Sidecar Schema
description: Metadata sidecar for extracted document text (output of extract_text_from_doc.py). Accompanies a .text.txt file.

uuid.description: Unique identifier (UUID v4) for this document extraction

page_count.description: Number of pages (PDF only; 0 for plain-text files)

word_count.description: Number of whitespace-delimited words in the extracted text

char_count.description: Number of characters in the extracted text

text_file.description: Filename of the companion .text.txt file containing the extracted text

processed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (UTC) when extraction was performed
